name: CIRRUS LOGIC, INC.
summary: Cirrus Logic, Inc. (Cirrus Logic, We, Us, Our, or the Company) is a leader in low-power, high-precision mixed-signal processing solutions that create innovative user experiences for the worlds top mobile and consumer applications. We were incorporated in California in 1984, became a public company in 1989 and were reincorporated in the State of Delaware in February 1999. Our primary facility, which houses engineering, sales and marketing, and administrative functions, is located in Austin, Texas...
